fields.name: client_id
fields.title: Client ID
fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Google Cloud Console

fields.name: client_secret
fields.title: Client Secret
fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from Google Cloud Console

fields.name: refresh_token
fields.title: Refresh Token
fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Refresh Token for obtaining new access tokens

replication_config.title: Replication Configuration
replication_config.description: Settings for data replication from Google Analytics.

fields.name: property_ids
fields.title: Property IDs
fields.description: A list of GA4 Property IDs to replicate data from.

custom_description:
Google Analytics 4 (GA4) Data API connector for accessing website and app analytics data.
This connector provides access to pre-configured analytics reports including website overview,
active users, traffic sources, page performance, device breakdowns, and geographic locations.
Reports are retrieved via the GA4 Data API v1beta using configurable date ranges and
property IDs. Requires OAuth2 authentication with Google Analytics read-only scope.
supported_questions:
- Show me the website overview report
- List daily active users
- Show weekly active user trends
- Get the four-weekly active users report
- List traffic sources
- Show me page performance metrics
- Get device breakdown data
- List user locations
- What are the top traffic sources by sessions?
- Which pages have the highest bounce rate?
- What devices do most users browse from?
- Which countries send the most traffic?
- How has daily active users changed over the last month?
unsupported_questions:
- Create a new GA4 property
- Delete analytics data
- Modify tracking configurations
- Run a custom report with arbitrary dimensions
- Access real-time analytics data

startDate.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format or relative (e.g., 30daysAgo)

endDate.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format or relative (e.g., today)

first_operation.description: Returns website overview metrics including total users, new users, sessions, bounce rate, page views, and average session duration by date.

schema.description: Total number of rows in the query result

startDate.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format or relative (e.g., 30daysAgo)

endDate.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format or relative (e.g., today)

website_overview.description: Returns website overview metrics including total users, new users, sessions, bounce rate, page views, and average session duration by date.

schema.description: Total number of rows in the query result

startDate.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format or relative (e.g., 30daysAgo)

endDate.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format or relative (e.g., today)

daily_active_users.description: Returns daily active user counts (1-day active users) by date.

schema.description: Total number of rows in the query result

startDate.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format or relative (e.g., 30daysAgo)

endDate.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format or relative (e.g., today)

weekly_active_users.description: Returns weekly active user counts (7-day active users) by date.

schema.description: Total number of rows in the query result

startDate.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format or relative (e.g., 30daysAgo)

endDate.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format or relative (e.g., today)

four_weekly_active_users.description: Returns 28-day active user counts by date.

schema.description: Total number of rows in the query result

startDate.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format or relative (e.g., 30daysAgo)

endDate.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format or relative (e.g., today)

traffic_sources.description: Returns traffic source metrics broken down by session source, session medium, and date, including users, sessions, bounce rate, and page views.

schema.description: Total number of rows in the query result

startDate.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format or relative (e.g., 30daysAgo)

endDate.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format or relative (e.g., today)

pages.description: Returns page-level metrics including page views and bounce rate, broken down by host name, page path, and date.

schema.description: Total number of rows in the query result

startDate.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format or relative (e.g., 30daysAgo)

endDate.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format or relative (e.g., today)

devices.description: Returns device-related metrics broken down by device category, operating system, browser, and date, including users, sessions, and page views.

schema.description: Total number of rows in the query result

startDate.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format or relative (e.g., 30daysAgo)

endDate.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format or relative (e.g., today)

locations.description: Returns geographic metrics broken down by region, country, city, and date, including users, sessions, bounce rate, and page views.

schema.description: Total number of rows in the query result
